default.stdout:
name: drone_swarm
services:
  control-plane:
    build:
      context: E:\Final Project\drone_swarm
      dockerfile: Dockerfile
    environment:
      DRONE_BACKEND_DEMO_FLEET_SIZE: "5"
      DRONE_BACKEND_MODE: production
      DRONE_BACKEND_SIMULATION_ENABLED: "false"
      DRONE_BACKEND_STALE_SEC: "5"
      DRONE_REQUIRE_SIGNED_COMMANDS: "false"
      DRONE_SECURITY_PROFILE: lab
      DRONE_SWARM_ADDR: :8080
      DRONE_TLS_CA_FILE: /app/certs/ca.crt
      DRONE_TLS_CERT_FILE: /app/certs/server.crt
      DRONE_TLS_ENABLED: "false"
      DRONE_TLS_KEY_FILE: /app/certs/server.key
      DRONE_TLS_REQUIRE_CLIENT_CERT: "false"
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD
        - curl
        - --fail
        - http://127.0.0.1:8080/api/v1/health
      timeout: 5s
      interval: 30s
      retries: 3
      start_period: 10s
    image: drone-swarm/control-plane:local
    networks:
      default: null
    ports:
      - mode: ingress
        target: 8080
        published: "8080"
        protocol: tcp
    restart: unless-stopped
    volumes:
      - type: bind
        source: E:\Final Project\drone_swarm\logs\control-plane
        target: /app/logs/control-plane
        bind: {}
      - type: bind
        source: E:\Final Project\drone_swarm\certs
        target: /app/certs
        read_only: true
        bind: {}
networks:
  default:
    name: drone_swarm_default

production.stdout:
name: drone_swarm
services:
  control-plane:
    build:
      context: E:\Final Project\drone_swarm
      dockerfile: deployment/docker/Dockerfile.production
    cap_drop:
      - ALL
    environment:
      DRONE_BACKEND_DEMO_FLEET_SIZE: "0"
      DRONE_BACKEND_MODE: production
      DRONE_BACKEND_SIMULATION_ENABLED: "false"
      DRONE_BACKEND_STALE_SEC: "5"
      DRONE_DEVICE_REGISTRY_FILE: /app/config/device-registry.json
      DRONE_REQUIRE_SIGNED_COMMANDS: "false"
      DRONE_SECURITY_PROFILE: lab
      DRONE_SWARM_ADDR: :8080
      DRONE_TLS_CA_FILE: /app/certs/ca.crt
      DRONE_TLS_CERT_FILE: /app/certs/server.crt
      DRONE_TLS_ENABLED: "false"
      DRONE_TLS_KEY_FILE: /app/certs/server.key
      DRONE_TLS_REQUIRE_CLIENT_CERT: "false"
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD
        - curl
        - --fail
        - --silent
        - http://127.0.0.1:8080/api/v1/ready
      timeout: 5s
      interval: 30s
      retries: 3
      start_period: 15s
    image: drone-swarm/control-plane:production
    logging:
      driver: json-file
      options:
        max-file: "5"
        max-size: 10m
    networks:
      default: null
    ports:
      - mode: ingress
        target: 8080
        published: "8080"
        protocol: tcp
    read_only: true
    restart: unless-stopped
    security_opt:
      - no-new-privileges:true
    stop_grace_period: 20s
    tmpfs:
      - /tmp/control-plane
    volumes:
      - type: bind
        source: E:\Final Project\drone_swarm\logs\control-plane
        target: /app/logs/control-plane
        bind: {}
      - type: bind
        source: E:\Final Project\drone_swarm\certs
        target: /app/certs
        read_only: true
        bind: {}
      - type: bind
        source: E:\Final Project\drone_swarm\config
        target: /app/config
        read_only: true
        bind: {}
networks:
  default:
    name: drone_swarm_default
